zh.Buckhurst by Withyham, Sussex, England: 英國素可巴可爾斯特 白 維提哈姆
zh.Buckhurst, Sussex, England: 英國英格蘭素可巴可爾斯特 白 維提哈姆
zh.lifeSummary: 當Humphrey Sackville於1430年2月6日出生在英國素可維提哈姆時，他的父親Sir Edward Sackville40歲，母親Margaret Wakehurst31歲。他於大約1459年與Catherine Browne結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1489年8月3日在英國素可巴可爾斯特 白 維提哈姆享年59歲，埋葬在英國素可維提哈姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Humphrey Sackville于1430年2月6日出生在英国素可維提哈姆时，他的父亲Sir Edward Sackville40岁，母亲Margaret Wakehurst31岁。他于大约1459年与Catherine Browne结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1489年8月3日在英国素可巴可爾斯特 白 維提哈姆享年59岁，埋葬在英国素可維提哈姆。

nameMeanings.name: Sackville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman, English: locative name from Sauqueville (Seine-Maritime) or Sacquenville (Eure).

variants.name: Sackwild
meanings: Jewish (Ashkenazic): from a Yiddish form sakwild, apparently meaning something like ‘game(bird), or venison, in a bag’.

nameMeanings.name: Humphrey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman name, Hunfrid, of Germanic origin, derived from hun ‘bear-cub, warrior’ + fred, frid ‘peace’. The Norman form absorbed the native Old English form, Hunfrith, which existed in England before the Conquest. The spelling with -ph- reflects classicizing influence. Since the 16th century it has enjoyed a modest popularity in England, having been borne most notably by the youngest son of King Henry IV , the Duke of Gloucester ( 1391–1447 ), known as ‘Duke Humphrey’. He was noted as a patron of literature, and founded what became the Bodleian Library at Oxford. In modern times, probably the most famous bearer has been the film star Humphrey Bogart ( 1899–1957 ).

variants.name: Humphry

Since the 16th century it has enjoyed a modest popularity in England, having been borne most notably by the youngest son of King Henry IV , the Duke of Gloucester ( 1391–1447 ), known as ‘Duke Humphrey’. He was noted as a patron of literature, and founded what became the Bodleian Library at Oxford. In modern times, probably the most famous bearer has been the film star Humphrey Bogart ( 1899–1957 ).

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Humphrey Sackville was born on 6 February 1430, in Withyham, Sussex, England, his father, Sir Edward Sackville, was 40 and his mother, Margaret Wakehurst, was 31. He married Catherine Browne about 1459. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 3 August 1489, in Buckhurst by Withyham, Sussex, England, at the age of 59, and was buried in Withyham, Sussex, England.

fr.Buckhurst, Sussex, England: Buckhurst by Withyham, Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Humphrey Sackville est né le 6 février 1430, à Withyham, Sussex, Angleterre, son père, Sir Edward Sackville, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Margaret Wakehurst, avait 31 ans. Il a épousé Catherine Browne environ 1459. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 3 août 1489, à Buckhurst by Withyham, Sussex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 59 ans, et a été enterré à Withyham, Sussex, Angleterre.

de.Buckhurst, Sussex, England: Buckhurst by Withyham, Sussex, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Humphrey Sackville am 6. Februar 1430 in Withyham, Sussex, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Edward Sackville 40 und seine Mutter Margaret Wakehurst 31. Er hat um 1459 Catherine Browne geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 3. August 1489 im Alter von 59 Jahren in Buckhurst by Withyham, Sussex, England und wurde in Withyham, Sussex, England begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Humphrey Sackvilleが1430年2月6日にイギリススセックスウィスイハムで生まれた時，父Sir Edward Sackvilleは40歳，母Margaret Wakehurstは31歳であった。約1459年にCatherine Browneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1489年8月3日にイギリススセックスブックハルスト ビー ウィスイハムで59歳で死去し，イギリススセックスウィスイハムにて埋葬された。

ko.Buckhurst, Sussex, England: 영국 잉글랜드 수세스 벅후르스트 비 위스이함
ko.lifeSummary: Humphrey Sackville(이)가 1430년 2월 6일 영국 수세스 위스이함에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Edward Sackville(은)는 40세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Wakehurst(은)는 31세였다. 그는 대략 1459년 Catherine Browne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1489년 8월 3일 영국 수세스 벅후르스트 비 위스이함에서 59세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수세스 위스이함에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Humphrey Sackville nasceu em 6 de fevereiro de 1430, em Withyham, Sussex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Edward Sackville, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Wakehurst, tinha 31 anos. Ele casou-se com Catherine Browne aproximadamente 1459. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Humphrey Sackville родился 6 февраля 1430 г. в местности витихам, суссекс, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Edward Sackville было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Wakehurst, 31. Он женился на женщине по имени Catherine Browne около 1459 г. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 3 августа 1489 г. в местности буккхурст би витихам, суссекс, Англия в возрасте 59 лет и был похоронен в местности витихам, суссекс, Англия.
